summary: Create a new RiskCalculatorOption
description:
This method will create a new RiskCalculatorOption model. The new model will initialize with the DTO data.

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: RiskConfigurationEdit

summary: Update an existing RiskCalculatorOption
description:
This method will update an existing RiskCalculatorOption with the data contained in the request DTO.

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: RiskConfigurationEdit

summary: Delete an existing RiskCalculatorOption
description:
This method will delete an existing RiskCalculatorOption model.

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: RiskConfigurationDelete

summary: Create a new RiskConfiguration model
description:
This method will create a new RiskConfiguration model with a first draft version. The new version will initialize with the DTO data and have the default status of Draft and the Author as the only required Signee.

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: RiskConfigurationEdit

summary: Create a new Version for an existing RiskConfiguration model
description:
This method will create a new RiskConfiguration model version. The new version will initialize with the DTO data. It will be assigned the next available version number, the default status of Draft and the Author as the only required Signee.

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: RiskConfigurationEdit

summary: Update an existing Version of a RiskConfiguration model
description:
This method will update an existing RiskConfiguration model version. Only Draft and Rejected versions are allowed to be updated.

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: RiskConfigurationEdit

summary: Delete an existing RiskConfiguration model
description:
This method will delete an existing RiskConfiguration model as well as all its versions.

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: RiskConfigurationDelete

summary: Create a draft from an existing Version of a RiskConfiguration model
description:
This method will clone the selected version of an existing RiskConfiguration model and create a new draft with the next version number. The new version will contain all the data of the original selected one, will have the default status of Draft and the Author as the only required Signee.

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: RiskConfigurationEdit

summary: Clone an existing Version of a RiskConfiguration model to a new model
description:
This method will clone the selected version of an existing RiskConfiguration model and create a new model with a single version. The new version will contain all the data of the original selected one, will have the default status of Draft and the Author as the only required Signee.

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: RiskConfigurationEdit

summary: Sign an existing Version of a RiskConfiguration model
description:
This method will Sign the selected version of an existing RiskConfiguration model. The Status of the version will change according to the action sent (Approve/Reject).

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: RiskConfigurationApprove

summary: Archive an existing Version of a RiskConfiguration model
description:
This method will Archive the selected version of an existing RiskConfiguration model.

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: RiskConfigurationArchive

summary: Submit an existing Version of a RiskConfiguration model for Approval
description:
This method will submit the selected version of an existing RiskConfiguration model for Approval.

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: RiskConfigurationEdit

summary: Delete an existing Version of a RiskConfiguration model
description:
This method will Delete the selected version of an existing RiskConfiguration model. If the version is the last one, then the version number of it will become the next available one for the model. Otherwise, the version number will be flagged as Deleted and become unavailable.

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: RiskConfigurationEdit

summary: Create a new RiskConfigurationCollection
description:
This method will create a new RiskConfigurationCollection and add it to the selected version of an existing RiskConfiguration model.

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: RiskConfigurationEdit

summary: Update an existing RiskConfigurationCollection
description:
This method will update the Items and custom Thresholds of an existing RiskConfigurationCollection.

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: RiskConfigurationEdit

summary: Delete an existing RiskConfigurationCollection
description:
This method will delete an existing RiskConfigurationCollection and remove it from the selected version of an existing RiskConfiguration model.

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: RiskConfigurationEdit

summary: Submit an existing Version of a RiskModel for Approval

description:
This method will Delete the selected version of an existing RiskModel. If the version is the last one, then the version number of it will become the next available one for the model. Otherwise, the version number will be flagged as Deleted and become unavailable.

summary: Create scoping rule set
description:
• Creates a new scoping rule set with a first draft version.
  • The new version is initialized with the provided data, a default "Draft" status and the author as the only required signee.


Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: RiskConfigurationEdit

summary: Create scoping rule set version
description:
• Creates a new version of an existing scoping rule set.
  • Assigns the next available version number.
  • The new version is initialized with the provided data, a default "Draft" status and the author as the only required signee.


Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: RiskConfigurationEdit

summary: Delete scoping rule set and all its versions
description:
Deletes an existing scoping rule set and all its versions.

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: RiskConfigurationDelete

summary: Update scoping rule set version
description:
Updates an existing scoping rule set version. Only draft versions are allowed to be updated.

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: RiskConfigurationEdit

summary: Delete scoping rule set version
description:
• Deletes the selected version of an existing scoping rule set.
  • If the version is the last one, then the version number of it will become the next available one for the model.


Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: RiskConfigurationDelete

summary: Clone scoping rule set version
description:
• Clones the selected version of an existing scoping rule set and creates a new model with a single version.
  • The new version contains all the data of the original selected one, will have the default status of draft and the author as the only required signee.
  • Returns the id of the cloned data group version.


Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: RiskConfigurationEdit

summary: Submit scoping rule set version for approval
description:
Submits the selected version of an existing scoping rule set for approval.

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: RiskConfigurationEdit

summary: Sign scoping rule set version
description:
Signs the selected version of an existing scoping rule set and changes the version status accordingly to the action (Approve/Reject).

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: RiskConfigurationApprove

summary: Archive scoping rule set version
description:
Archives the selected version of an existing scoping rule set.

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: RiskConfigurationArchive
